input: Identify four drugs that are commonly administered with <DRUG>19041823</DRUG> in the most recent hospital stay.
gold: WITH last_visits AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (vo.person_id) vo.visit_occurrence_id FROM visit_occurrence AS vo ORDER BY vo.person_id, vo.visit_start_date DESC), patients_with_19041823 AS (SELECT lv.visit_occurrence_id FROM last_visits AS lv JOIN drug_exposure AS de1 ON lv.visit_occurrence_id = de1.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de1.drug_concept_id = 19041823), co_prescribed_drugs AS (SELECT de2.drug_concept_id FROM drug_exposure de2 JOIN patients_with_19041823 AS p ON de2.visit_occurrence_id = p.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de2.drug_concept_id != 19041823) SELECT d.drug_concept_id AS concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM co_prescribed_drugs AS d JOIN concept AS c ON d.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY d.drug_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 4;
pred:
WITH RecentHospitalStay AS (
    SELECT visit_occurrence_id
    FROM visit_occurrence
    WHERE visit_concept_id = 9201 -- Hospitalization
    ORDER BY visit_start_date DESC, visit_start_datetime DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
DrugPairCounts AS (
    SELECT d1.drug_concept_id AS drug1_concept_id, d2.drug_concept_id AS drug2_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM drug_exposure d1
    JOIN drug_exposure d2 ON d1.visit_occurrence_id = d2.visit_occurrence_id AND d1.drug_exposure_id <> d2.drug_exposure_id
    JOIN RecentHospitalStay rhs ON d1.visit_occurrence_id = rhs.visit_occurrence_id
    WHERE d1.drug_concept_id = 19041823 -- <DRUG>19041823</DRUG>
    GROUP BY d1.drug_concept_id, d2.drug_concept_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT c1.concept_id AS drug1_concept_id, c1.concept_name AS drug1_name, c2.concept_id AS drug2_concept_id, c2.concept_name AS drug2_name, dpc.count
FROM DrugPairCounts dpc
JOIN concept c1 ON c1.concept_id = dpc.drug1_concept_id
JOIN concept c2 ON c2.concept_id = dpc.drug2_concept_id
ORDER BY dpc.count DESC
LIMIT 4;

input: In the most recent hospital visit, which drugs were most commonly prescribed with <DRUG>19041823</DRUG>?
gold: WITH last_visits AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (vo.person_id) vo.visit_occurrence_id FROM visit_occurrence AS vo ORDER BY vo.person_id, vo.visit_start_date DESC), patients_with_19041823 AS (SELECT lv.visit_occurrence_id FROM last_visits AS lv JOIN drug_exposure AS de1 ON lv.visit_occurrence_id = de1.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de1.drug_concept_id = 19041823), co_prescribed_drugs AS (SELECT de2.drug_concept_id FROM drug_exposure de2 JOIN patients_with_19041823 AS p ON de2.visit_occurrence_id = p.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de2.drug_concept_id != 19041823) SELECT d.drug_concept_id AS concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM co_prescribed_drugs AS d JOIN concept AS c ON d.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY d.drug_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 4;
pred:
WITH RecentHospitalVisits AS (
    SELECT visit_occurrence_id
    FROM visit_occurrence
    WHERE visit_concept_id = (
        SELECT concept_id
        FROM concept
        WHERE concept_name ILIKE '%hospital%'
    )
    ORDER BY visit_start_date DESC, visit_start_datetime DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
DrugPrescriptions AS (
    SELECT d1.drug_concept_id AS drug1_concept_id, d2.drug_concept_id AS drug2_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS prescription_count
    FROM drug_exposure d1
    JOIN drug_exposure d2 ON d1.visit_occurrence_id = d2.visit_occurrence_id AND d1.drug_exposure_id <> d2.drug_exposure_id
    WHERE d1.drug_concept_id = 19041823 AND d2.visit_occurrence_id IN (SELECT visit_occurrence_id FROM RecentHospitalVisits)
    GROUP BY d1.drug_concept_id, d2.drug_concept_id
)
SELECT c.concept_id, c.concept_name, dp.prescription_count
FROM DrugPrescriptions dp
JOIN concept c ON c.concept_id = dp.drug2_concept_id
ORDER BY dp.prescription_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

input: Which four medications are most often prescribed along with <DRUG>19041823</DRUG> at the final hospital visit?
gold: WITH last_visits AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (vo.person_id) vo.visit_occurrence_id FROM visit_occurrence AS vo ORDER BY vo.person_id, vo.visit_start_date DESC), patients_with_19041823 AS (SELECT lv.visit_occurrence_id FROM last_visits AS lv JOIN drug_exposure AS de1 ON lv.visit_occurrence_id = de1.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de1.drug_concept_id = 19041823), co_prescribed_drugs AS (SELECT de2.drug_concept_id FROM drug_exposure de2 JOIN patients_with_19041823 AS p ON de2.visit_occurrence_id = p.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de2.drug_concept_id != 19041823) SELECT d.drug_concept_id AS concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM co_prescribed_drugs AS d JOIN concept AS c ON d.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY d.drug_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 4;
pred:
WITH final_visits AS (
    SELECT visit_occurrence_id
    FROM visit_occurrence
    WHERE visit_type_concept_id = (
        SELECT concept_id
        FROM concept
        WHERE concept_name ILIKE '%final%'
    )
),
drug_prescriptions AS (
    SELECT drug_exposure_id, drug_concept_id
    FROM drug_exposure
    WHERE visit_occurrence_id IN (SELECT visit_occurrence_id FROM final_visits)
),
combined_drugs AS (
    SELECT a.drug_concept_id AS drug_id_1, b.drug_concept_id AS drug_id_2
    FROM drug_prescriptions a
    JOIN drug_prescriptions b ON a.visit_occurrence_id = b.visit_occurrence_id
    WHERE a.drug_concept_id != b.drug_concept_id
)
SELECT c.drug_id_1, d.concept_name AS drug_name_1, c.drug_id_2, e.concept_name AS drug_name_2
FROM combined_drugs c
JOIN concept d ON c.drug_id_1 = d.concept_id
JOIN concept e ON c.drug_id_2 = e.concept_id
WHERE d.concept_id = 19041823
GROUP BY c.drug_id_1, c.drug_id_2
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 4;

input: Which 2 drugs are most frequently co-prescribed with <DRUG>21127790</DRUG> during the last hospital visit?
gold: WITH last_visits AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (vo.person_id) vo.visit_occurrence_id FROM visit_occurrence AS vo ORDER BY vo.person_id, vo.visit_start_date DESC), patients_with_21127790 AS (SELECT lv.visit_occurrence_id FROM last_visits AS lv JOIN drug_exposure AS de1 ON lv.visit_occurrence_id = de1.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de1.drug_concept_id = 21127790), co_prescribed_drugs AS (SELECT de2.drug_concept_id FROM drug_exposure de2 JOIN patients_with_21127790 AS p ON de2.visit_occurrence_id = p.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de2.drug_concept_id != 21127790) SELECT d.drug_concept_id AS concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM co_prescribed_drugs AS d JOIN concept AS c ON d.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY d.drug_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 2;

WITH co_prescribed_drugs AS (
    SELECT 
        d1.drug_concept_id AS drug1_concept_id,
        d2.drug_concept_id AS drug2_concept_id,
        COUNT(*) AS co_prescription_count
    FROM 
        drug_exposure d1
    JOIN 
        drug_exposure d2 ON d1.visit_occurrence_id = d2.visit_occurrence_id AND d1.drug_concept_id <> d2.drug_concept_id
    WHERE 
        d1.drug_concept_id = 21127790 AND d1.visit_occurrence_id IN (
            SELECT 
                visit_occurrence_id
            FROM 
                visit_occurrence
            WHERE 
                visit_concept_id IN (
                    SELECT 
                        concept_id
                    FROM 
                        concept
                    WHERE 
                        domain_id = 'Visit' AND concept_class_id = 'Visit'
                )
            ORDER BY 
                visit_start_date DESC
            LIMIT 1
        )
    GROUP BY 
        d1.drug_concept_id, d2.drug_concept_id
)
SELECT 
    drug1_concept_id, drug2_concept_id, co_prescription_count
FROM 
    co_prescribed_drugs
ORDER BY 
    co_prescription_count DESC
LIMIT 2;

SELECT c.concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS drug_count
FROM drug_exposure de
JOIN concept c ON de.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id
JOIN visit_occurrence vo ON de.visit_occurrence_id = vo.visit_occurrence_id
WHERE vo.visit_concept_id = (
    SELECT visit_concept_id
    FROM concept
    WHERE concept_id = 21127790
)
AND vo.visit_occurrence_id = (
    SELECT MAX(visit_occurrence_id)
    FROM visit_occurrence
    WHERE person_id = de.person_id
)
GROUP BY c.concept_id, c.concept_name
ORDER BY drug_count DESC
LIMIT 2;

input: What are the leading 3 diagnoses from last month in patients aged 60 or more?
gold: SELECT co.condition_concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM condition_occurrence AS co JOIN person AS p ON co.person_id = p.person_id JOIN concept AS c ON co.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE date_part('year', age(co.condition_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) >= 60 AND co.condition_start_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND co.condition_start_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY co.condition_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 3;
pred:
SELECT c.concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(co.condition_occurrence_id) AS diagnosis_count
FROM condition_occurrence co
JOIN person p ON co.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN concept c ON co.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id
WHERE p.year_of_birth <= EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 60
AND co.condition_start_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 month'
AND co.condition_start_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY c.concept_id, c.concept_name
ORDER BY diagnosis_count DESC
LIMIT 3;

input: In March/last year, what percentile does a <MEASUREMENT>4007810</MEASUREMENT> result of 82.6 fall into among patients of the same age as <PERSON_ID>6220777510338714</PERSON_ID>?
gold: WITH reference_patient AS (SELECT p.person_id, DATE_PART('year', AGE(MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1, 3, 1), p.birth_datetime)) AS age FROM person AS p WHERE p.person_id = 6220777510338714), patients_same_age AS (SELECT p.person_id FROM person AS p JOIN reference_patient r ON DATE_PART('year', AGE(MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1, 3, 1), p.birth_datetime)) = r.age), march_last_year_measurements AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN patients_same_age AS pa ON m.person_id = pa.person_id WHERE m.measurement_concept_id = 4007810 AND m.measurement_date >= MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1, 3, 1) AND m.measurement_date < MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1, 4, 1) AND m.value_as_number IS NOT NULL), ranked_measurements AS (SELECT mlm.value_as_number, percent_rank() OVER (ORDER BY mlm.value_as_number) AS pct FROM march_last_year_measurements AS mlm) SELECT rm.pct AS percentile FROM ranked_measurements AS rm WHERE rm.value_as_number >= 82.6 ORDER BY rm.value_as_number LIMIT 1;
pred:
WITH Age_Group AS (
    SELECT
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(birth_datetime)) AS age
    FROM
        person
    WHERE
        person_id = 6220777510338714
),
Measurement_Data AS (
    SELECT
        value_as_number,
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(measurement_date)) AS age
    FROM
        measurement
    WHERE
        measurement_concept_id = 4007810
        AND measurement_date >= (DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 year' + INTERVAL '3 months')
        AND measurement_date < DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '3 months'
)
SELECT
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY value_as_number) AS median
FROM
    Measurement_Data
WHERE
    age = (SELECT age FROM Age_Group);

JOIN concept c ON co.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id
WHERE co.condition_start_date = '23/01/2123'
GROUP BY c.concept_id, c.concept_name
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 3;

    procedure_occurrence p

input: What are the 5 most frequently observed specimens that patients have been tested during the same month as having received a <PROCEDURE>4300757</PROCEDURE> procedure during that hospital visit?
gold: SELECT s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS specimen_count FROM procedure_occurrence AS po JOIN visit_occurrence AS vo ON po.visit_occurrence_id = vo.visit_occurrence_id JOIN specimen AS s ON s.person_id = po.person_id AND s.specimen_datetime >= po.procedure_datetime AND DATE_TRUNC('month', s.specimen_date) = DATE_TRUNC('month', po.procedure_date) JOIN concept AS c ON s.specimen_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE po.procedure_concept_id = 4300757 AND vo.visit_type_concept_id = 32220 GROUP BY s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY specimen_count DESC LIMIT 5;
pred:
SELECT 
    specimen.specimen_concept_id, 
    COUNT(specimen.specimen_concept_id) AS specimen_count
FROM 
    specimen
JOIN 
    procedure_occurrence ON specimen.person_id = procedure_occurrence.person_id
WHERE 
    procedure_occurrence.procedure_concept_id = 4300757 
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM procedure_occurrence.procedure_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM specimen.specimen_date)
    AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM procedure_occurrence.procedure_date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM specimen.specimen_date)
GROUP BY 
    specimen.specimen_concept_id
ORDER BY 
    specimen_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

input: List the five most frequent specimen types tested on patients within the same month after having received a <PROCEDURE>4300757</PROCEDURE> procedure on the current hospital visit?
gold: SELECT s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS specimen_count FROM procedure_occurrence AS po JOIN visit_occurrence AS vo ON po.visit_occurrence_id = vo.visit_occurrence_id JOIN specimen AS s ON s.person_id = po.person_id AND s.specimen_datetime >= po.procedure_datetime AND DATE_TRUNC('month', s.specimen_date) = DATE_TRUNC('month', po.procedure_date) JOIN concept AS c ON s.specimen_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE po.procedure_concept_id = 4300757 AND vo.visit_type_concept_id = 32220 GROUP BY s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY specimen_count DESC LIMIT 5;
pred:
SELECT 
    c.concept_id, 
    c.concept_name, 
    COUNT(*) AS specimen_count
FROM 
    specimen s
JOIN 
    condition_occurrence co ON s.person_id = co.person_id
JOIN 
    concept c ON s.specimen_concept_id = c.concept_id
WHERE 
    co.condition_concept_id = 4300757
    AND co.visit_occurrence_id = s.visit_occurrence_id
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.specimen_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM co.condition_start_date)
    AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM s.specimen_date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM co.condition_start_date)
GROUP BY 
    c.concept_id, 
    c.concept_name
ORDER BY

input: What are the top 3 lab tests frequently ordered after diagnosis with <CONDITION>4229440</CONDITION> during the same ICU stay up to 2203?
gold: WITH icu_visits AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%'), condition_in_icu AS (SELECT co.visit_detail_id, co.condition_start_datetime FROM condition_occurrence AS co JOIN icu_visits AS iv ON co.visit_detail_id = iv.visit_detail_id WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 4229440 AND co.condition_start_datetime < '2204-01-01'), labs_after_condition AS (SELECT m.measurement_concept_id FROM measurement AS m JOIN condition_in_icu AS co ON m.visit_detail_id = co.visit_detail_id AND m.measurement_datetime >= co.condition_start_datetime WHERE m.measurement_datetime < '2204-01-01') SELECT c.concept_name AS test_name, l.measurement_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM labs_after_condition AS l JOIN concept AS c ON l.measurement_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY l.measurement_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 3;
pred:
WITH icu_stays AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT visit_occurrence_id
    FROM condition_occurrence
    WHERE condition_concept_id = 4229440
),
lab_tests AS (
    SELECT 
        drug_exposure_id, 
        drug_concept_id, 
        visit_occurrence_id, 
        COUNT(*) AS test_count
    FROM drug_exposure
    WHERE visit_occurrence_id IN (SELECT visit_occurrence_id FROM icu_stays)
    GROUP BY drug_exposure_id, drug_concept_id, visit_occurrence_id
)
SELECT 
    c.concept_id, 
    c.concept_name, 
    l.test_count
FROM lab_tests l
JOIN concept c ON l.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id
ORDER BY l.test_count DESC
LIMIT 3;

gold: WITH icu_visits AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%'), condition_in_icu AS (SELECT co.visit_detail_id, co.condition_start_datetime FROM condition_occurrence AS co JOIN icu_visits AS iv ON co.visit_detail_id = iv.visit_detail_id WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 37160824 AND co.condition_start_datetime < '2021-01-01'), labs_after_condition AS (SELECT m.measurement_concept_id FROM measurement AS m JOIN condition_in_icu AS co ON m.visit_detail_id = co.visit_detail_id AND m.measurement_datetime >= co.condition_start_datetime WHERE m.measurement_datetime < '2021-01-01') SELECT c.concept_name AS test_name, l.measurement_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM labs_after_condition AS l JOIN concept AS c ON l.measurement_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY l.measurement_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 3;

WITH icu_stays AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT visit_occurrence_id
    FROM condition_occurrence
    WHERE condition_concept_id = 37160824
    AND condition_start_date < '2021-01-01'
),
lab_tests AS (
    SELECT m.measurement_concept_id, m.visit_occurrence_id, COUNT(*) AS test_count
    FROM measurement m
    JOIN icu_stays i ON m.visit_occurrence_id = i.visit_occurrence_id
    GROUP BY m.measurement_concept_id, m.visit_occurrence_id
)
SELECT c.concept_id, c.concept_name, l.test_count

ORDER BY l.test_count DESC

input: Which 3 lab tests were most often administered after <CONDITION>37160824</CONDITION> was diagnosed, within the same ICU stay, before 2021?
gold: WITH icu_visits AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%'), condition_in_icu AS (SELECT co.visit_detail_id, co.condition_start_datetime FROM condition_occurrence AS co JOIN icu_visits AS iv ON co.visit_detail_id = iv.visit_detail_id WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 37160824 AND co.condition_start_datetime < '2021-01-01'), labs_after_condition AS (SELECT m.measurement_concept_id FROM measurement AS m JOIN condition_in_icu AS co ON m.visit_detail_id = co.visit_detail_id AND m.measurement_datetime >= co.condition_start_datetime WHERE m.measurement_datetime < '2021-01-01') SELECT c.concept_name AS test_name, l.measurement_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM labs_after_condition AS l JOIN concept AS c ON l.measurement_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY l.measurement_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 3;

    c.concept_name,

JOIN

input: Which specialty does the physician have who was responsible for a <PROCEDURE>2779573</PROCEDURE> procedure on patient <PERSON_ID>3856814790790267215</PERSON_ID> on the last hospital admission?

pred:
SELECT c.concept_name
FROM provider p
JOIN procedure_occurrence po ON p.provider_id = po.provider_id
JOIN concept c ON p.specialty_concept_id = c.concept_id
WHERE po.procedure_concept_id = 2779573
AND po.person_id = 3856814790790267215
AND po.visit_occurrence_id = (
  SELECT visit_occurrence_id
  FROM visit_occurrence
  WHERE person_id = 3856814790790267215
  ORDER BY visit_start_date DESC
  LIMIT 1
);

input: What are the six leading conditions persisting for more than a year among patients between 50 and 59 years old until the end of January 2187?
gold: SELECT c.concept_id, c.concept_name AS condition_name, COUNT(*) AS condition_count FROM condition_era AS ce JOIN person AS p ON ce.person_id = p.person_id JOIN concept AS c ON ce.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE ce.condition_era_start_date < DATE '2187-02-01' AND ce.condition_era_end_date > ce.condition_era_start_date + INTERVAL '1 year' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM age(ce.condition_era_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) BETWEEN 50 AND 59 GROUP BY c.concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY condition_count DESC LIMIT 6;
pred:
SELECT 
    c.condition_concept_id, 
    c.condition_start_date, 
    c.condition_end_date, 
    p.person_id
FROM 
    condition_occurrence c
JOIN 
    person p ON c.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE 
    p.year_of_birth BETWEEN 1950 AND 1959
    AND c.condition_end_date IS NULL
    AND c.condition_start_date <= '2018-01-31'
    AND c.condition_start_date >= '2018-01-01'
ORDER BY 
    c.condition_start_date
LIMIT 6;

input: What is the number of deaths caused by <CONDITION>312327</CONDITION> among males aged 30-39 after receiving a <PROCEDURE>2004844</PROCEDURE> procedure and determine differences between pre- and post-2010.
gold: WITH deaths_total AS (SELECT d.person_id, d.death_date, d.death_datetime, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(d.death_date, p.birth_datetime)) AS age_at_death FROM death AS d JOIN person AS p ON d.person_id = p.person_id WHERE d.cause_concept_id = 312327 AND p.gender_concept_id = 8507), qualified_deaths AS (SELECT dt.death_date FROM deaths_total AS dt JOIN procedure_occurrence AS po ON dt.person_id = po.person_id AND po.procedure_concept_id = 2004844 AND po.procedure_datetime < dt.death_datetime WHERE dt.age_at_death BETWEEN 30 AND 39), death_before AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_before FROM qualified_deaths AS q WHERE q.death_date < DATE '2010-01-01'), death_after AS(SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_after FROM qualified_deaths AS qd WHERE qd.death_date >= DATE '2010-01-01') SELECT db.count_before, da.count_after, da.count_after - db.count_before AS difference FROM death_before AS db CROSS JOIN death_after AS da;

WITH Procedure_Date AS (
    SELECT person_id, MIN(procedure_date) AS first_procedure_date
    FROM procedure_occurrence
    WHERE procedure_concept_id = 2004844
    GROUP BY person_id
),
Deaths AS (
    SELECT d.person_id, d.death_date, c.condition_concept_id
    FROM death d
    JOIN condition_occurrence c ON d.person_id = c.person_id
    WHERE c.condition_concept_id = 312327
),
Age_Group AS (
    SELECT p.person_id, p.gender_concept_id, p.year_of_birth
    FROM person p
    WHERE p.gender_concept_id = 8507 -- Male
      AND p.year_of_birth BETWEEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(NOW(), INTERVAL '30 years')) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(NOW(), INTERVAL '40 years'))
),
Pre_Post_2010 AS (
    SELECT d.person_id, d.death_date, d.condition_concept_id, pd.first_procedure_date
    FROM Deaths d
    JOIN Procedure_Date pd ON d.person_id = pd.person_id
    WHERE pd.first_procedure_date <= '2010-01-01'
),
Post_2010 AS (
    SELECT d.person_id, d.death_date, d.condition_concept_id, pd.first_procedure_date
    FROM Deaths d
    JOIN Procedure_Date pd ON d.person_id = pd.person_id
    WHERE pd.first_procedure_date > '2010-01-01'
)
SELECT
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Pre_Post_2010) AS pre_2010_deaths,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Post_2010) AS post_2010_deaths;

JOIN condition_occurrence ON death.person_id = condition_occurrence.person_id
JOIN procedure_occurrence ON death.person_id = procedure_occurrence.person_id
JOIN person ON death.person_id = person.person_id
WHERE condition_occurrence.condition_concept_id = 312327
AND procedure_occurrence.procedure_concept_id = 2004844
AND person.gender_concept_id = 8507
AND person.year_of_birth BETWEEN 1980 AND 1989
AND death.death_date BETWEEN '1990-01-01' AND '2010-12-31';

gold: WITH deaths_total AS (SELECT d.person_id, d.death_date, d.death_datetime, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(d.death_date, p.birth_datetime)) AS age_at_death FROM death AS d JOIN person AS p ON d.person_id = p.person_id WHERE d.cause_concept_id = 312327 AND p.gender_concept_id = 8507), qualified_deaths AS (SELECT dt.death_date FROM deaths_total AS dt JOIN procedure_occurrence AS po ON dt.person_id = po.person_id AND po.procedure_concept_id = 2004844 AND po.procedure_datetime < dt.death_datetime WHERE dt.age_at_death BETWEEN 30 AND 39), death_before AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_before FROM qualified_deaths AS q WHERE q.death_date < DATE '2010-01-01'), death_after AS(SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_after FROM qualified_deaths AS qd WHERE qd.death_date >= DATE '2010-01-01') SELECT db.count_before, da.count_after, da.count_after - db.count_before AS difference FROM death_before AS db CROSS JOIN death_after AS da;

    SELECT p.person_id
    FROM person p
    JOIN procedure_occurrence po ON p.person_id = po.person_id
    WHERE p.gender_concept_id = 8507
      AND p.year_of_birth BETWEEN 1980 AND 1989
      AND po.procedure_concept_id = 2004844
),
Condition_312327_Deaths AS (
    SELECT p.person_id, d.death_date
    FROM condition_occurrence co
    JOIN death d ON co.person_id = d.person_id
    JOIN person p ON co.person_id = p.person_id
    WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 312327
      AND d.death_date >= '2010-01-01'
),
Pre_2010_Deaths AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.person_id) AS pre_2010_deaths
    FROM Procedure_30s_Men p
    LEFT JOIN Condition_312327_Deaths d ON p.person_id = d.person_id
    WHERE d.death_date IS NULL
),
Post_2010_Deaths AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.person_id) AS post_2010_deaths
    FROM Procedure_30s_Men p
    JOIN Condition_312327_Deaths d ON p.person_id = d.person_id
)
SELECT pre.pre_2010_deaths, post.post_2010_deaths
FROM Pre_2010_Deaths pre, Post_2010_Deaths post;

    FROM condition_occurrence
    WHERE condition_concept_id = 760859

    SELECT s.specimen_id, s.specimen_date, s.person_id, c.condition_start_date, c.condition_end_date

    WHERE s.specimen_date BETWEEN c.condition_start_date AND c.condition_end_date
),
date_diff AS (

),
ranked_specimens AS (

gold: WITH target_conditions AS (SELECT c.person_id, c.condition_start_date FROM condition_occurrence AS c JOIN person AS p ON p.person_id = c.person_id WHERE c.condition_concept_id = 134865 AND c.condition_start_date = MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int, 16) AND p.gender_concept_id = 8532 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(c.condition_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) BETWEEN 40 AND 49), drug_within_2_days AS (SELECT d.drug_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS freq FROM drug_exposure AS d JOIN target_conditions AS tc ON d.person_id = tc.person_id WHERE d.drug_exposure_start_date BETWEEN tc.condition_start_date AND tc.condition_start_date + INTERVAL '23 days' GROUP BY d.drug_concept_id) SELECT dwd.drug_concept_id, c.concept_name AS drug_name, dwd.freq FROM drug_within_2_days dwd JOIN concept AS c ON c.concept_id = dwd.drug_concept_id ORDER BY dwd.freq DESC LIMIT 5;

    c.concept_id, 
    c.concept_name, 
    COUNT(de.drug_exposure_id) AS prescription_count
FROM 
    drug_exposure de
JOIN 
    person p ON de.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN 
    condition_occurrence co ON de.person_id = co.person_id
JOIN 
    concept c ON de.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id
WHERE 
    p.gender_concept_id = 8507 -- Female
    AND p.year_of_birth BETWEEN 1940 AND 1962 -- Age 40s
    AND co.condition_concept_id = 134865 -- <CONDITION>134865</CONDITION>
    AND co.condition_start_date BETWEEN (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '23 days') AND CURRENT_DATE
    AND co.condition_start_date >= (DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '16 days')
GROUP BY 
    c.concept_id, 
    c.concept_name
ORDER BY 
    prescription_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

gold: WITH first_icu_visit AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' AND vd.person_id = 92785 ORDER BY vd.visit_detail_start_datetime LIMIT 1), drug_exposures_filtered AS (SELECT de.drug_concept_id, de.drug_exposure_start_date FROM drug_exposure AS de JOIN first_icu_visit AS fiv ON de.visit_detail_id = fiv.visit_detail_id WHERE de.drug_concept_id IN (43770380, 587128)), both_drugs_same_day AS (SELECT def.drug_exposure_start_date FROM drug_exposures_filtered AS def GROUP BY def.drug_exposure_start_date HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT def.drug_concept_id) = 2) SELECT bsd.drug_exposure_start_date FROM both_drugs_same_day AS bsd ORDER BY bsd.drug_exposure_start_date DESC OFFSET 1 LIMIT 1;

WITH drug_counts AS (
    SELECT
        person_id,
        drug_concept_id,
        drug_exposure_start_date,
        COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM
        drug_exposure
    WHERE
        person_id = 92785
        AND drug_concept_id IN (43770380, 587128)
        AND visit_occurrence_id IN (
            SELECT
                visit_occurrence_id
            FROM
                visit_occurrence
            WHERE
                visit_concept_id = 9202 -- ICU admission
        )
    GROUP BY
        person_id,
        drug_concept_id,
        drug_exposure_start_date
),
ranked_drugs AS (
    SELECT
        person_id,
        drug_concept_id,
        drug_exposure_start_date,
        count,

    FROM
        drug_counts
)
SELECT
    rd1.drug_exposure_start_date
FROM
    ranked_drugs rd1
JOIN
    ranked_drugs rd2 ON rd1.person_id = rd2.person_id AND rd1.drug_concept_id = rd2.drug_concept_id
WHERE
    rd1.rank = 2 AND rd2.rank = 2 AND rd1.drug_concept_id = 43770380 AND rd2.drug_concept_id = 587128
ORDER BY
    rd1.drug_exposure_start_date DESC

input: List the top 3 drugs frequently given with <DRUG>742142</DRUG> at the patient's most recent hospital visit.
gold: WITH last_visits AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (vo.person_id) vo.visit_occurrence_id FROM visit_occurrence AS vo ORDER BY vo.person_id, vo.visit_start_date DESC), patients_with_742142 AS (SELECT lv.visit_occurrence_id FROM last_visits AS lv JOIN drug_exposure AS de1 ON lv.visit_occurrence_id = de1.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de1.drug_concept_id = 742142), co_prescribed_drugs AS (SELECT de2.drug_concept_id FROM drug_exposure de2 JOIN patients_with_742142 AS p ON de2.visit_occurrence_id = p.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de2.drug_concept_id != 742142) SELECT d.drug_concept_id AS concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM co_prescribed_drugs AS d JOIN concept AS c ON d.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY d.drug_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 3;

    WHERE visit_concept_id = 9202 -- Hospital visit
    AND person_id IN (

        WHERE drug_concept_id = 742142 -- <DRUG>742142</DRUG>
        GROUP BY person_id

    )
    ORDER BY visit_start_date DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
DrugCombinations AS (
    SELECT d1.drug_concept_id AS drug1_concept_id, d2.drug_concept_id AS drug2_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS combination_count
    FROM drug_exposure d1
    JOIN drug_exposure d2 ON d1.person_id = d2.person_id AND d1.visit_occurrence_id = d2.visit_occurrence_id
    WHERE d1.drug_concept_id = 742142 -- <DRUG>742142</DRUG>
    AND d2.drug_concept_id != 742142
    AND d1.visit_occurrence_id IN (SELECT visit_occurrence_id FROM RecentVisits)
    GROUP BY d1.drug_concept_id, d2.drug_concept_id
)
SELECT c1.concept_id AS drug1_concept_id, c1.concept_name AS drug1_name, c2.concept_id AS drug2_concept_id, c2.concept_name AS drug2_name, dc.combination_count
FROM DrugCombinations dc
JOIN concept c1 ON c1.concept_id = dc.drug1_concept_id
JOIN concept c2 ON c2.concept_id = dc.drug2_concept_id

    FROM measurement
    WHERE person_id = 810181375 AND measurement_concept_id = 21493228
    GROUP BY value_as_number
),
Last_Measurement AS (
    SELECT MAX(measurement_date) AS last_measurement_date, value_as_number
    FROM measurement
    WHERE person_id = 810181375 AND measurement_concept_id = 21493228
    GROUP BY value_as_number
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT first_measurement_date FROM First_Measurement ORDER BY first_measurement_date LIMIT 1) AS first_measurement_date,
    (SELECT last_measurement_date FROM Last_Measurement ORDER BY last_measurement_date DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_measurement_date,
    (SELECT value_as_number FROM First_Measurement ORDER BY first_measurement_date LIMIT 1) AS first_value,
    (SELECT value_as_number FROM Last_Measurement ORDER BY last_measurement_date DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_value;

input: Can we observe a change in the <MEASUREMENT>21493228</MEASUREMENT> of patient <PERSON_ID>810181375</PERSON_ID> from their first hospital visit's first recorded value to the first value on their final ICU visit?
gold: WITH icu_visit AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE vd.person_id = 810181375 AND c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' ORDER BY vd.visit_detail_start_datetime DESC LIMIT 1), icu_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN icu_visit AS iv ON m.visit_detail_id = iv.visit_detail_id WHERE m.person_id = 810181375 AND m.measurement_concept_id = 21493228 ORDER BY m.measurement_datetime LIMIT 1), hospital_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN visit_occurrence AS vo ON m.visit_occurrence_id = vo.visit_occurrence_id WHERE m.person_id = 810181375 AND m.measurement_concept_id = 21493228 ORDER BY vo.visit_start_datetime, m.measurement_datetime LIMIT 1) SELECT hm.value_as_number AS first_hospital_value, im.value_as_number AS first_icu_value, im.value_as_number - hm.value_as_number AS value_difference FROM hospital_measurement AS hm CROSS JOIN icu_measurement AS im;

WITH FirstHospitalVisit AS (
    SELECT MIN(visit_start_date) AS first_visit_date
    FROM visit_occurrence
    WHERE person_id = 810181375 AND visit_concept_id IN (SELECT concept_id FROM concept WHERE concept_name ILIKE '%hospital%')
),
FirstICUVisit AS (
    SELECT MIN(visit_start_date) AS first_icu_date
    FROM visit_occurrence
    WHERE person_id = 810181375 AND visit_concept_id IN (SELECT concept_id FROM concept WHERE concept_name ILIKE '%icu%')
),
FirstMeasurementHospital AS (
    SELECT value_as_number
    FROM measurement
    WHERE person_id = 810181375 AND measurement_concept_id = 21493228 AND visit_occurrence_id IN (
        SELECT visit_occurrence_id
        FROM visit_occurrence
        WHERE person_id = 810181375 AND visit_concept_id IN (SELECT concept_id FROM concept WHERE concept_name ILIKE '%hospital%')
        AND visit_start_date = (SELECT first_visit_date FROM FirstHospitalVisit)
    )
),
FirstMeasurementICU AS (
    SELECT value_as_number
    FROM measurement
    WHERE person_id = 810181375 AND measurement_concept_id = 21493228 AND visit_occurrence_id IN (
        SELECT visit_occurrence_id
        FROM visit_occurrence
        WHERE person_id = 810181375 AND visit_concept_id IN (SELECT concept_id FROM concept WHERE concept_name ILIKE '%icu%')
        AND visit_start_date = (SELECT first_icu_date FROM FirstICUVisit)
    )
)
SELECT

input: Which two diagnoses were most frequent in patients 18+ during the past month?
gold: SELECT co.condition_concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM condition_occurrence AS co JOIN person AS p ON co.person_id = p.person_id JOIN concept AS c ON co.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE date_part('year', age(co.condition_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) >= 18 AND co.condition_start_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND co.condition_start_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY co.condition_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 2;
pred:
SELECT c.concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS frequency
FROM condition_occurrence co
JOIN concept c ON co.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id
JOIN person p ON co.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE p.year_of_birth >= EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 18
  AND co.condition_start_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month'
GROUP BY c.concept_id, c.concept_name
ORDER BY frequency DESC
LIMIT 2;

SELECT c.concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS diagnosis_count
FROM condition_occurrence co
JOIN person p ON co.person_id = p.person_id
JOIN concept c ON co.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id
WHERE p.year_of_birth <= EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 18
AND co.condition_start_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 month'
AND co.condition_start_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY c.concept_id, c.concept_name
ORDER BY diagnosis_count DESC;

)

input: What was the average difference between charge time and billing time this year?

) AS subquery;

input: Cluster patient admissions based on insurance types and the total hospital cost spent.
gold: <NO_SQL>
pred:
SELECT 
  p.person_id,
  p.gender_concept_id,
  p.year_of_birth,
  p.month_of_birth,
  p.day_of_birth,
  p.race_concept_id,
  p.ethnicity_concept_id,
  v.visit_occurrence_id,
  v.visit_start_date,
  v.visit_end_date,
  v.visit_type_concept_id,
  v.care_site_id,
  v.provider_id,
  SUM(c.cost) AS total_cost
FROM 
  visit_occurrence v
JOIN 
  person p ON v.person_id = p.person_id
LEFT JOIN 
  (SELECT 
     visit_occurrence_id, 
     cost
   FROM 
     (SELECT 
        visit_occurrence_id, 
        cost, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY visit_occurrence_id ORDER BY cost DESC) AS rn
      FROM 
        (SELECT 
           visit_occurrence_id, 
           SUM(cost) AS cost
         FROM 
           (SELECT 
              visit_occurrence_id, 
              cost
            FROM 
              drug_exposure
            WHERE 
              cost IS NOT NULL
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 
              visit_occurrence_id, 
              cost
            FROM 
              condition_occurrence
            WHERE 
              cost IS NOT NULL
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 
              visit_occurrence_id, 
              cost
            FROM 
              procedure_occurrence
            WHERE 
              cost IS NOT NULL
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 
              visit_occurrence_id, 
              cost
            FROM 
              device_exposure
            WHERE 
              cost IS NOT NULL
            UNION ALL
            SELECT 
              visit_occurrence_id, 
              cost
            FROM 
              measurement
            WHERE 
              cost IS NOT NULL) AS all_costs
         GROUP BY 
           visit_occurrence_id) AS total_costs) AS ranked_costs
   WHERE 
     rn = 1) c ON v.visit_occurrence_id = c

input: What is the difference in the lengths of <CAREUNIT>38004270</CAREUNIT> stays between patients with 'completed' and 'delayed' payment statuses?
gold: <NO_SQL>
pred:
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN payment_status = 'completed' THEN stay_length END) AS completed_stays_length,
  SUM(CASE WHEN payment_status = 'delayed' THEN stay_length END) AS delayed_stays_length,
  ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN payment_status = 'completed' THEN stay_length END) - SUM(CASE WHEN payment_status = 'delayed' THEN stay_length END)) AS length_difference
FROM (
  SELECT
    v.care_site_id,
    v.visit_occurrence_id,
    v.visit_start_date,
    v.visit_end_date,
    v.visit_end_date - v.visit_start_date + 1 AS stay_length,
    c.condition_concept_id,
    c.condition_status_concept_id,
    c.condition_status_source_value
  FROM visit_occurrence v
  JOIN condition_occurrence c ON v.visit_occurrence_id = c.visit_occurrence_id
  WHERE v.care_site_id = 38004270
) AS subquery
JOIN (
  SELECT
    visit_occurrence_id,
    CASE
      WHEN condition_status_concept_id = 44814787 THEN 'completed'
      WHEN condition_status_concept_id = 44814788 THEN 'delayed'
    END AS payment_status
  FROM condition_occurrence
) AS payment_status ON subquery.visit_occurrence_id = payment_status.visit_occurrence_id
WHERE subquery.condition_concept_id = 44814789;

input: What is the average difference in admission duration between patients whose procedure outcomes were all 'successful' and those whose outcomes were not?
gold: <NO_SQL>
pred:
WITH ProcedureOutcomes AS (
    SELECT 
        v.person_id,
        v.visit_occurrence_id,
        v.visit_start_date,
        v.visit_end_date,
        CASE 
            WHEN p.procedure_concept_id = 438568 THEN 'successful'
            ELSE 'not successful'
        END AS outcome
    FROM 
        visit_occurrence v
    LEFT JOIN 
        procedure_occurrence p ON v.visit_occurrence_id = p.visit_occurrence_id
    WHERE 
        p.procedure_concept_id IN (438568, 438570)
),
DurationDiff AS (
    SELECT 
        outcome,
        AVG(visit_end_date - visit_start_date) AS avg_duration
    FROM 
        ProcedureOutcomes
    GROUP BY 
        outcome
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT avg_duration FROM DurationDiff WHERE outcome = 'successful') -
    (SELECT avg_duration FROM DurationDiff WHERE outcome = 'not successful') AS difference;

input: Just count the number of patients asked for a copy of their prescription during hospital stay.
gold: <NO_SQL>
pred:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT person_id) 
FROM condition_occurrence 
WHERE condition_concept_id = (
  SELECT concept_id 
  FROM concept 
  WHERE concept_name ILIKE '%prescription%'
) 
AND visit_occurrence_id IN (
  SELECT visit_occurrence_id 
  FROM visit_occurrence 
  WHERE visit_concept_id = (
    SELECT concept_id 
    FROM concept 
    WHERE concept_name ILIKE '%hospital stay%'
  )
);

input: Which <DRUG>43833975</DRUG> are the most prescribed?
gold: <NO_SQL>
pred:
SELECT c.concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(d.drug_exposure_id) AS prescription_count
FROM concept c
JOIN drug_exposure d ON c.concept_id = d.drug_concept_id
WHERE c.concept_id = 43833975
GROUP BY c.concept_id, c.concept_name
ORDER BY prescription_count DESC;
